title: Basic Commands
description: Learn the fundamental Linux commands to navigate and explore the terminal

title: Navigation & Paths
description: Master directory navigation with absolute and relative paths

title: File Operations
description: Create, view, and manage files and directories

title: Copying & Moving
description: Copy, move, and rename files and directories

title: Viewing Files
description: Peek at file contents with head, tail, and wc

title: Finding Things
description: Search for files and text with find, grep, and which

title: File Permissions
description: Read and change file permissions and ownership

title: Text Processing
description: Sort, deduplicate, and extract data with sort, uniq, and cut

title: Pipes & Redirection
description: Chain commands together with pipes and redirect output to files

title: Process Management
description: List, monitor, and stop running processes

title: Users & Groups
description: Understand user identity, groups, and sudo privileges
